sql_array: CREATE TABLE WS.WS.SYS_DAV_RES (id INT PRIMARY KEY, RES_CONTENT VARCHAR(1000), CREATED_AT TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO WS.WS.SYS_DAV_RES (id, RES_CONTENT) VALUES (1, '<body>This is a test with place and knowledge.</body>');
INSERT INTO WS.WS.SYS_DAV_RES (id, RES_CONTENT) VALUES (2, '<body>Another example with nothing.</body>');
SELECT id, search_excerpt(vector('place', 'knowledge'), cast(RES_CONTENT as varchar), 100, 80, 100, 'b', 0) AS excerpt FROM WS.WS.SYS_DAV_RES WHERE RES_CONTENT IS NOT NULL;

SELECT id, search_excerpt(vector('place', 'knowledge'), cast(RES_CONTENT as varchar), 100, 80, 100, 'b', 1) AS excerpt FROM (SELECT RES_CONTENT FROM WS.WS.SYS_DAV_RES WHERE id < 3) AS subquery WHERE id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM WS.WS.SYS_DAV_RES);

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT DISTINCT id, search_excerpt(vector('place', 'knowledge'), cast(RES_CONTENT as varchar), 100, 80, 100, 'b', 1) FROM WS.WS.SYS_DAV_RES HAVING COUNT(RES_CONTENT) > 0) AS temp_table;
SELECT id, search_excerpt(vector('place', 'knowledge'), cast(RES_CONTENT as varchar), 100, 80, 100, 'b', 1) AS excerpt FROM WS.WS.SYS_DAV_RES WHERE LENGTH(RES_CONTENT) > 0 ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC;
CREATE TABLE WS.WS.SYS_DAV_RES_TEMP AS SELECT id, RES_CONTENT FROM WS.WS.SYS_DAV_RES WHERE RES_CONTENT IS NOT NULL;
INSERT INTO WS.WS.SYS_DAV_RES_TEMP SELECT id, search_excerpt(vector('place', 'knowledge'), cast(RES_CONTENT as varchar), 100, 80, 100, 'b', 0) FROM WS.WS.SYS_DAV_RES WHERE id IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, search_excerpt(vector('place', 'knowledge'), cast(NULL AS varchar), 100, 80, 100, 'b', 0) AS excerpt FROM WS.WS.SYS_DAV_RES WHERE RES_CONTENT IS NULL;
